message:
feat(tests): adapt test suites to enrichment API changes and fix clippy lint in seqlock_fastpath

PearlTower enrichment session 2026-03-14 evolved several core data
structures; this commit updates all affected integration tests to match:

- seqlock_fastpath: replace `|| vec![]` closure with `Vec::new` function
  pointer (clippy::redundant_closure lint)
- claim_entitlement: rename ClaimDomain::Performance/Security to
  ShippedSurface/Supremacy; update counterexample_ledger →
  claim_counterexample_ledger; adapt MissingEvidenceCutset fields
  (target_atom_id → atom_id, missing_side_constraints →
  missing_constraint_ids, minimal → cost + blocking_rule_ids);
  adapt ImpossibilityCertificate fields (required_evidence_kind →
  evidence_kind, impossibility_reason → remediation);
  adapt CounterexampleLedgerEntry fields (triggered_rule_id →
  blocking_rule_id, add atom_id/remediation, drop evidence_state/
  affected_atom_ids/verdict)
- parser_oracle_gate: fix seed determinism test (same inputs → same
  output, not different-modes → different output); replace DriftClass
  ordering assertion with all-variants-distinct check
- parser_operator_developer_runbook: expand README assertions to cover
  repo-local target dir, step logs, and separate ci/drill replay wrappers
- rgc_planning_track: access coordination event via .event field
- semantic_twin: adapt TransitionGuard to use variable/op/threshold
  instead of condition/parameters; add deterministic/required fields
  to TelemetryContractRef; rename transition fields (from_variable →
  source_variable, to_variable → target_variable, id → transition_id);
  fix MonitorOp::Gt → Ge in guard validation test
- frx_canonical_react_behavior_corpus: append 12 enrichment contract
  property tests covering deterministic parsing, schema prefix, bead
  hierarchy, fixture count minimums, and determinism flags
- frx_track_e: rename duplicate test function with _v2 suffix

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
